business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial property operations including warehousing and manufacturing facilities

coverages_discussed.notes: 2024 policy CP00007001, no claims, no cancellation

positives: No claims in 2024, 2023, or 2022 policy years
No cancellations in prior 4 years of insurance history
Stable carrier relationships with major national insurers (Liberty Mutual, Hartford, Chubb)
Diverse portfolio across multiple Ohio metropolitan markets
concerns: One claim reported in 2021 policy year with Hartford Financial Services
Location LOC-008 (Uniontown, OH) has no own/lease designation provided
Concentration of risk in single state (Ohio)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 1 claim in the prior 4 years (2021 policy with Hartford); zero claims in 2022, 2023, and 2024. No cancellations reported.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC is an Ohio-based industrial real estate operator with 9 locations totaling approximately 1,948,500 square feet across warehouse, manufacturing, and office occupancies. Portfolio is primarily leased with one owned location in Toledo.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Operations include 6 warehouse facilities (LOC-001, LOC-002, LOC-003, LOC-005, LOC-006, LOC-008), 2 manufacturing facilities (LOC-004 Dayton, LOC-007 Toledo), and 1 corporate office (LOC-009 Columbus). Locations span Columbus, Brooklyn, Dayton, Cincinnati, Toledo, and Uniontown, Ohio.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history shows a single claim occurring during the 2021 policy period underwritten by Hartford Financial Services (policy 0000007099). Policy years 2022 (Chubb), 2023 (Hartford), and 2024 (Liberty Mutual) reflect zero claims activity.
